raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tavatt buhs mans
Wahrds/ kas no uannas Mut-
tes iseet/ tas ne atgreeſifees pee
mannis tuſch/ bet darrihs to/
kas man patihk/ un isdohfees lab-
bi/ par ko es to fuhtu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Jo ar Preeku juhs iseec-
feet/ un ar Meern tapfeek juhs
wadditi/ tee Kalni un Pakalni
flawebs juhsu Preekschá ar Ga-
wileſchann/ un wiſi RohkiLanka
planſchkinahs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ehrſchku-Kruhmo Weeta
usangs Preedes/ un Dadschu
Weeta usangs Mirtu-Kohki/ un
tas buhs tam KUNGAM par
weenu Wahrdu/ un par weenu
muhschigu Sihmi/ kas ne taps
isdeldeta.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta LVI. Nodalla.
Weena Pamahzischana us teem Judeem/ ka teem
buhs no Grehkeem atſtahtees: 1. Un ne,
weenam buhs tahdas Schehlastibas nezeeni,
gam turretees: 3. Ar weenu bahrgu Ap-
draudeschanu/ ka Deews rohs nepetizzigus
Mahzitajus/ kas wairak jawe Wehdera vehs
gahda/ neka Deewa Eohdu mekle/ ganschi
fohdihs: 9.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Na fakka tas KUNGGS:
Turrait to Teefu/ un
carrait Taſniba/ jo
manna Bestitchana irr twvu/ ka
ta nahk/ un manna Taſniba/
ka ta tohp parahdita.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Swehtigs irr tas Zilweks/
kas to darra/ un tas Zilweka
Behrns/ kas stipri pee ta tar-
tahs/ kas to SwehDeenu Swehti/
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "un winnu ne ſagabna/ un far-
fawu Rohku no wiſſas Lauu
darrischanas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tas Sweschajs/ t
tam KUNGAM peckerrabs/
tas ne runna/ un fakka: T
KINGS ier mannt wiſſai
faweem Landim fehſbris/
tas Rahmihts lai ne take
Rangi/ es cfuu weens fakal
Kohks.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jo ta fakka tas KING
us teem Rahmiteem: Kas ma-
nas Swehdeenags ſwehti un
wehle to/ kas man patihk/
turr mannu Derribu ſipri.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Es dohſchu teem man-
Namná/ un mannu Muſ-
Starpâ weenu Weetu/ un w
nu labbakn Wahrdu neka
Dehlu un to Meitu/ weenu mu-
schigu Wahrdu dohſchu es tee
kas ne taps isdeldehts.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tobß fweschus Be-
nus/ kas tam KUNGAM p-
kerahs winnam kalpoht/ un
KUNGA Wahrdu mthieht/
tee winnam par Kalveem efu-
wifnu/ kas to Swehdeenuu twe-
ti/ un winnu ne ſagahna/ un k-
stipri pee mannas Derribas ti-
cahs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tohs neſſchu es arrids-
pee manna ſwehta Kalna/ un
preezinaschu tohs manna Lu-
ſchanas Namná/ winnu-
dſumo-llppuri un winnu Lppi-
buhs patizzigi us mannu-
tari. Jo mans Namns to-
weens Luhgſchanas-Nams
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
